revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Aoyama Kumano Shrine]][[ja:熊野神社 (渋谷区)]]
{{Short description|Kumano shrine in Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan|qq=}} {{expand Japanese|topic=struct|熊野神社 (渋谷区)|date=December 2019|qq=}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Aoyama Kumano Shrine | native_name = | native_name_lang = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = Harajuku-Kumano-Shrine-02.jpg | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image_upright = | alt = | caption = The shrine in 2011 | map_type = Japan | map_size = | map_alt = | map_relief = | map_caption = | coordinates = {{coord|35.67245|139.71394|type:landmark_globe:earth_region:JP|display=ti|qq=}} | coordinates_footnotes = | religious_affiliation = | locale = | location = {{ill|Shibuya|en|Shibuya|qid=Q193638|lt=Shibuya|1=Shibuya}} | deity = | rite = | sect = | tradition = | festival = | cercle = | sector = | municipality = | district = | territory = | prefecture = | state = | province = | region = {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}} | country = {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}} | administration = | consecration_year = | organisational_status = | functional_status = | heritage_designation = | ownership = | governing_body = | leadership = | bhattaraka = | patron = | religious_features_label = | religious_features = | architect = | architecture_type = | architecture_style = | founded_by = | creator = | funded_by = | general_contractor = | established = | groundbreaking = | year_completed = | construction_cost = | date_demolished = | facade_direction = | capacity = | length = | width = | width_nave = | interior_area = | height_max = | dome_quantity = | dome_height_outer = | dome_height_inner = | dome_dia_outer = | dome_dia_inner = | minaret_quantity = | minaret_height = | spire_quantity = | spire_height = | site_area = | temple_quantity = | monument_quantity = | shrine_quantity = | inscriptions = | materials = | elevation_m = | elevation_footnotes = | nrhp = | designated = | added = | refnum = | footnotes = | website = }} '''Aoyama Kumano Shrine''' is a [[kumano shrine]] in {{ill|Shibuya|en|Shibuya|qid=Q193638|lt=Shibuya|1=Shibuya}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}, Japan. It dates back to 1619 and was originally named ''Kumano Daigongen'' but was changed in 1869, {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} due to a law separating {{ill|Buddhism in Japan|en|Buddhism in Japan|qid=Q736311|lt=''Buddhism''|1=Buddhism in Japan}} and [[Shinto|''Shintoism'']], the shrine primarily practices Shinto principles. == Deities == Source:<ref>{{Cite web |date=2024-08-13 |title=Aoyama Kumano Shrine - Japan Documented |url=https://japan-documented.com/culture/shinto-shrine/aoyama-kumano-shrine/ |access-date=2024-11-16 |language=en-US|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami}} * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru-no-Mikoto]] * [[Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|Ooyatsuhime-no-Mikoto]] * [[Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|Tsumaatsuhime-no-Mikoto]] == References == {{Reflist|qq=}} ==External links== * {{Commons category-inline|Aoyama-Kumano-jinja|qq=}} {{Kumano Faith|qq=}} {{Japan-struct-stub|qq=}}
[[en:Aoyama Kumano Shrine]]
